// purpose: Pylance/Pyright config scoped to the voice-agent subproject.
// why_separate: The Aegis core uses Python 3.11 + acp/.venv at the repo root. The voice-agent has a separate Python 3.14 venv with livekit-agents, chromadb, sentence-transformers, etc. — none of which exist in the Aegis venv. Pylance walks up from a file looking for the nearest pyrightconfig; putting one here pins voice-agent files to the correct interpreter and avoids the 'Import livekit could not be resolved' false positives.
